name: Sandtris
author: Poki
description: Sandtris puts a twist on your favorite Tetris game by turning blocks into sand! Watch as colorful blocks fall slowly and then transform into grains of sand upon landing. Your goal is to fill lines completely from left to right, causing the sand to disappear and making room for more. Test your skills in the classic mode, or push your limits in the speeding-up mode where the blocks fall faster and faster! Can you keep up with the shifting sands? How to play Sandtris? Move your finger or mouse left and right to aim! Who created Sandtris? Sandtris is created by A-Team. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Sandtris for free? You can play Sandtris for free on Poki. Can I play Sandtris on mobile devices and desktop? Sandtris can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
